SEARCH
Package compiler.ast.expression

Class Expression

java.lang.Object
compiler.ast.ASTNode
compiler.ast.expression.Expression
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expr
Direct Known Subclasses:
BinaryExpr, MemoryNode, NumberNode, SensorNode
public abstract class Expression extends ASTNode implements Expr
Base class for all expression AST nodes. Expressions represent arithmetic and lookup operations that produce values (integers). They appear in:
  • Conditions: expressions on both sides of relational operators (e.g., health < 50)
  • Commands: memory indices and values for updates (e.g., mem[0] := energy + 10)
  • Sensors: arguments to sensor queries (e.g., nearby[direction])
Expression types include:
  • NumberNode: numeric literals
  • BinaryExpr: arithmetic operations (+, -, *, /)
  • MemoryNode: memory access (mem[index])
  • SensorNode: sensor queries (nearby, ahead, random, smell)
See Also:
  • NumberNode
  • BinaryExpr
  • MemoryNode
  • SensorNode

  • Constructor Details

    • Expression

      protected Expression(int line, int column, ASTNode... children)
      Initializes an Expression node at the given source location.
      Parameters:
      line - source line number (1-based)
      column - source column number (1-based)
      children - direct child nodes in source order
